calendar.matters:
Motion To Strike Costs Or To Tax Costs & Deduction Of Defts' Costs
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Defendants' Motion to Strike Costs Bill or tax costs. Appearing are Paula Bauer, Esq. for Plaintiffs, and Kristin Marsh, Esq. for Defendants and moving parties. Following oral arugment, the matter is submitted by both sides. The Court grants the motion to strike the cost bill on account of failure to effect timely service. Defendants counsel is directed to prepare an appropriate order granting the motion, and Plaintiff's counsel is directed to prepare the judgment in the action. Judge: Lillian K. Sing; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Carlito Mandia CSR 689 D. 613
